publicRelease.policy: Every required gate must be ready, evidenced, and rechecked in strict mode on the tagged commit before any public artifact is built or published.

gates.title: Naming and legal approval
gates.requirement: Approve the Hebrus and Hebrus Studio names, collision and trademark review, licensing, attribution, and public-release legal posture.
gates.remediation: Record the final approval reference and reviewer after all naming and legal checks close.

gates.title: Private vulnerability reporting
gates.requirement: Enable and test a private vulnerability-reporting route that does not expose report details publicly.
gates.remediation: Enable GitHub private vulnerability reporting, submit a harmless test report, and record the private intake and test references.

gates.title: Private conduct-report intake
gates.requirement: Provide and test a private maintainer channel for sensitive Code of Conduct reports.
gates.remediation: Publish the private route in CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, test maintainer receipt, and record the intake and test references.

gates.title: Developer ID signing
gates.requirement: Sign the macOS application with an authorized Apple Developer ID Application identity instead of the community ad-hoc identity.
gates.remediation: Configure protected signing credentials, replace the ad-hoc packaging contract, and record the certificate identity and verification reference.

gates.title: Notarization and stapling
gates.requirement: Notarize the signed macOS artifact, staple the accepted ticket, and pass Gatekeeper assessment on a clean Mac.
gates.remediation: Configure notarization, verify stapling and Gatekeeper, and record the submission and clean-machine verification references.

gates.title: Hosted CI on the exact release commit
gates.requirement: Complete the required hosted CI lanes on the exact commit targeted by the version tag.
gates.remediation: Run hosted CI on the final commit, record the workflow reference, and set HEBRUS_HOSTED_CI_COMMIT to that full commit in the protected release environment.

gates.title: Model-backed engine qualification on exact commits
gates.requirement: Qualify packaged Studio against an exact Hebrus engine commit and immutable model artifact with model-backed startup, inference, and shutdown evidence.
gates.remediation: Record the engine commit, model SHA-256, qualification report, and protected exact-commit attestations for both Studio and engine.
